design_philosophy: Netflix-style cinematic presentation. High contrast, layered darkness, horizontal scrolling for product discovery, luxury aesthetic.

headings.usage: H1-H4, large cinematic titles. Always tracking-tight.

body.usage: UI elements, paragraphs, prices. Clean and legible.

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for main sections. Bleed elements to the edge where appropriate (like hero images and carousel rows).
layout_and_spacing.horizontal_carousels: Use flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory with gap-4 or gap-6. Hide default scrollbars. Items should peak from the right edge to hint at scrolling.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grids: For non-carousel sections (like categories overview), use asymmetrical grids (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12).

ui_components.hero: Full viewport height. Background image with heavy bottom vignette (bg-gradient-to-t from-background via-background/50 to-transparent). Content bottom-left aligned. Primary CTA large, like a 'Play' button.
ui_components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/60 border-b border-white/10). Logo left, links center, icons (search, user, cart) right.
ui_components.product_card: Vertical poster ratio (2:3 or 3:4). Image fills card. On hover, show overlay with details, price, and 'Add to Cart' button. Use Framer Motion for slight scale up.
ui_components.buttons: Primary: Solid #D4AF37 background, black text, rounded-md (not pill). Hover: Brighten. Secondary: outline border-white/20, text-white.
ui_components.cart_drawer: Slide over from right. Deep dark background. Glassmorphism effect.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Product cards scale up (scale-105) on hover. Buttons show a slight glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)]).
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Fade in smoothly. Staggered fade-up for horizontal carousel items.
interactions_and_motion.accessibility: Ensure all interactive elements have focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary). Provide data-testid on everything.

image_urls.description: VivaLusa logo, glowing gold on pure black background
Cinematic wide-angle shot of glowing luxury cosmetic bottle
Dark velvet texture for premium category dividers
Macro photography of shimmering red lipstick smear
Clear glass perfume bottle on dark cloth
Clear glass perfume bottle with silver label
Woman applying makeup illuminated by soft light

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Netflix-style horizontal product discovery: Create a custom component for horizontal product rows using flex, overflow-x-auto, and snap-x snap-mandatory. Hide scrollbars using CSS.
Global Layout: Background must be very dark (#09090B). Use 'dark' class on the html element.
Product details view should resemble a cinematic show page: large full-bleed backdrop image with the product, fading into black at the bottom where specifics (price, shipping) are listed.
Implement Zip/Postal code distance-based shipping calculation. Mock a simple logic: (e.g., base $5 + $0.05 * Math.abs(userZip - storeZip)).
Users who log in receive a 5% discount applied automatically in the cart/checkout.
Admin panel needs CRUD operations for products. Seed with the provided luxury perfume images and dummy cosmetics.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a premium, thin-line look that matches the aesthetic.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and major sections.
